mapper.select: /* com.shop.mapper.frontWeb.Product.selectProductDetail */ SELECT P.ID AS id , P.PARTNER_ID AS partnerId , P.PROD_CD AS prodCd , P.PROD_NM AS prodNm , P.PROD_TP AS prodTp , P.PROD_DET_TP AS prodDetTp , P.COMPOSITION AS composition , P.REP_FILE_ID AS repFileId , P.DETAIL_FILE_ID AS detailFileId , P.SIZE_FILE_ID AS sizeFileId , P.ETC_FILE_ID AS etcFileId , P.MAKE_YMD AS makeYmd , P.ORG_AMT AS orgAmt , P.SELL_AMT AS sellAmt , P.DISCOUNT_RATE AS discountRate , P.IS_SPRING AS isSpring , P.IS_SUMMER AS isSummer , P.IS_AUTUMN AS isAutumn , P.IS_WINTER AS isWinter , P.FAVORITE_POINT AS favoritePoint , FD_REP.SYS_FILE_NM AS repSysFileNm , FD_DET.SYS_FILE_NM AS detailSysFileNm , FD_SZ.SYS_FILE_NM AS sizeSysFileNm , FD_ETC.SYS_FILE_NM AS etcSysFileNm FROM TB_PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD_REP ON FD_REP.FILE_ID = P.REP_FILE_ID AND FD_REP.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD_REP.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD_DET ON FD_DET.FILE_ID = P.DETAIL_FILE_ID AND FD_DET.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD_DET.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD_SZ ON FD_SZ.FILE_ID = P.SIZE_FILE_ID AND FD_SZ.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD_SZ.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD_ETC ON FD_ETC.FILE_ID = P.ETC_FILE_ID AND FD_ETC.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD_ETC.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE P.ID = #{productId} AND P.DEL_YN = 'N'

/* com.shop.mapper.frontWeb.Product.selectProductDetList */ SELECT PD.ID AS id , PD.PRODUCT_ID AS productId , PD.PRODUCT_DET_SEQ AS productDetSeq , PD.PRODUCT_DET_SIZE AS productDetSize , PD.PRODUCT_DET_COLOR AS productDetColor , PD.SKU_DISCOUNT_RATE AS skuDiscountRate , PD.PRODUCT_DET_CNTN AS productDetCntn , FD.SYS_FILE_NM AS sysFileNm , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN R.PLUSMINUS = 'P' THEN R.RECEIV_CNT ELSE -R.RECEIV_CNT END) FROM TB_RECEIVING R WHERE R.PRODUCT_DET_ID = PD.ID AND R.DEL_YN = 'N' ), 0) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(OI.QUANTITY) FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM OI JOIN TB_ORDER O ON O.ID = OI.ORDER_ID AND O.ORDER_STATUS NOT IN ('C') WHERE OI.PRODUCT_DET_ID = PD.ID ), 0) AS stock FROM TB_PRODUCT_DET PD LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD ON FD.FILE_ID = PD.FILE_ID AND FD.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE PD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND PD.SLEEP_YN = 'N' AND PD.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY PD.PRODUCT_DET_SEQ

/* com.shop.mapper.frontWeb.Product.selectRelatedProductList */ SELECT P.ID AS id , P.PROD_NM AS prodNm , P.SELL_AMT AS sellAmt , P.DISCOUNT_RATE AS discountRate , FD.SYS_FILE_NM AS sysFileNm FROM TB_PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD ON FD.FILE_ID = P.REP_FILE_ID AND FD.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND FD.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE P.DEL_YN = 'N' AND P.ID != #{productId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_CATEGORY_PRODUCT CP WHERE CP.PARTNER_ID = P.PARTNER_ID AND CP.PRODUCT_ID = P.ID AND CP.CATEGORY_ID IN ( SELECT CATEGORY_ID FROM TB_CATEGORY_PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} ) ) ORDER BY P.FAVORITE_POINT DESC LIMIT 10
